text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Agnes Tachyon's momentous debut
race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But instead of worrying about the race, she's
worried instead about how she ran out of tea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Showing no signs of pre-race jitters, she casually
makes for the track.
